body.title: Inference proxy: Sources device (provider abstraction)
body.result: Built in 715eca0a — sources/models/rules/health all in devices/inference/, 14 tests passing
body.description:
Provider abstraction layer inside the inference proxy. Each provider (Anthropic, OpenRouter, Ollama, Igor) is a Source object with: api_key (from env), base_url, request/response wire format adapter, and availability flag. Adding a new provider = adding a new Source config, no code changes elsewhere.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/ (new sources/ subdir)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: Source base class, adapters for Anthropic/OR/Ollama. Out of scope: routing rules, model registry.
**Completion criteria:** Can send the same prompt to Anthropic and OR via the Sources layer interchangeably. Keys read from env, not hardcoded.
